name: architecture-lock
description: Defines the fixed architecture boundaries of the Website Factory — layer responsibilities, modification rules, and scope constraints.

layer1.name: JCodesMore
layer1.responsibility: Receives user commands, dispatches Layer 2, aggregates results

layer2.name: OpenCode
layer2.responsibility: Executes workflows, calls Layer 3, manages retries, generates reports

layer3.name: Subsystems
layer3.responsibility: Performs domain-specific operations when called by Layer 2

modificationRules.description: Rules governing what can and cannot be modified during infrastructure upgrades
forbidden: Modify existing source code in src/
Modify existing deployment code in deployment/

dataCompleteness.description: This upgrade must never reduce data completeness in any system
